name: pi-agent-config
description_en: Personal [pi](https://pi.dev) coding agent configuration: safety extensions, subagent definitions, skills, and prompt templates for a more powerful AI-assisted development workflow.
description_zh: 个人 [pi](https://pi.dev) 编码代理配置：安全扩展、子代理定义、技能和提示模板，用于更强大的 AI 辅助开发工作流。
